Web Development.name: E-Commerce Storefront
Web Development.desc: Full-featured online store with product catalog, cart system, Stripe checkout, admin dashboard, and order tracking. Responsive design with skeleton loaders.

Web Development.name: Real-Time Chat Application
Web Development.desc: WebSocket-powered chat with rooms, typing indicators, message reactions, file uploads, and online presence. End-to-end encrypted messaging.

Web Development.name: Blog Platform with CMS
Web Development.desc: Markdown-based blogging platform with rich text editor, SEO optimization, RSS feeds, analytics dashboard, and comment system with moderation.

Web Development.name: Music Streaming App (Retrowave)
Web Development.desc: Full music player with decade browsing, search, playlists, audio visualization, and streaming via YouTube Music API. Neon retrowave aesthetic.

Web Development.name: Recipe Sharing Platform
Web Development.desc: Community-driven recipe site with ingredient-based search, step-by-step instructions, nutritional info, meal planning calendar, and grocery list generator.

AI & Machine Learning.name: Synthetic AGI Orchestrator
AI & Machine Learning.desc: Multi-model AI synthesis engine that routes queries to GPT, Claude, and Gemini, then merges outputs for maximum accuracy. Features consensus scoring and confidence metrics.

AI & Machine Learning.name: AI-Powered Code Reviewer
AI & Machine Learning.desc: Automated PR review bot that analyzes code quality, security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and suggests improvements using LLM reasoning.

AI & Machine Learning.name: RAG Knowledge Base
AI & Machine Learning.desc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation system with document ingestion, vector embeddings, semantic search, and conversational Q&A with source citations.

AI & Machine Learning.name: Sentiment Analysis Dashboard
AI & Machine Learning.desc: Real-time social media sentiment tracker with trend visualization, entity extraction, topic modeling, and alerting for brand mentions.

AI & Machine Learning.name: AI Image Generator & Editor
AI & Machine Learning.desc: Text-to-image generation interface with inpainting, outpainting, style transfer, and prompt engineering presets. Gallery with favorites and sharing.

AI & Machine Learning.name: Intelligent Resume Builder
AI & Machine Learning.desc: AI-powered resume creator that analyzes job descriptions, suggests bullet points, optimizes for ATS, and generates multiple format exports (PDF, DOCX).

Data & Analytics.name: IPL Match Predictor
Data & Analytics.desc: Data-driven sports prediction engine using historical stats, player form, venue analysis, and ensemble ML models. Live leaderboard and prediction accuracy tracking.

Data & Analytics.name: Finance Tracker Dashboard
Data & Analytics.desc: Personal finance manager with bank sync, expense categorization, budget alerts, investment tracking, and interactive charts with drill-down capability.

Data & Analytics.name: COVID/Health Data Visualizer
Data & Analytics.desc: Interactive choropleth maps and time-series charts for health data exploration. Supports custom dataset uploads and comparison views.

Data & Analytics.name: GitHub Analytics Dashboard
Data & Analytics.desc: Visualize your coding activity - commit heatmaps, language breakdowns, PR metrics, contribution streaks, and repository health scores.

Data & Analytics.name: Real-Time Stock Screener
Data & Analytics.desc: Live stock data with technical indicators, candlestick charts, watchlists, alerts, and fundamental analysis filters. Paper trading simulator included.

Developer Tools & CLI.name: CLI Task Manager (Taskforge)
Developer Tools & CLI.desc: Terminal-based project management with Kanban boards, time tracking, git integration, priority sorting, and Pomodoro timer. Syncs to cloud.

Developer Tools & CLI.name: API Mock Server Generator
Developer Tools & CLI.desc: Auto-generate realistic mock APIs from OpenAPI/Swagger specs with faker-powered data, latency simulation, and error scenario testing.

Developer Tools & CLI.name: Code Snippet Manager
Developer Tools & CLI.desc: Searchable, tagged code snippet library with syntax highlighting, multi-language support, VS Code extension integration, and team sharing.

Developer Tools & CLI.name: Log Analyzer & Visualizer
Developer Tools & CLI.desc: Parse, filter, and visualize application logs with pattern detection, error clustering, timeline views, and alert rule configuration.

Developer Tools & CLI.name: Database Schema Designer
Developer Tools & CLI.desc: Visual ERD builder with drag-and-drop tables, relationship mapping, SQL/migration export, and schema versioning. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite.

Developer Tools & CLI.name: Regex Pattern Playground
Developer Tools & CLI.desc: Interactive regex tester with real-time matching, group highlighting, cheat sheet, pattern library, and explanation mode that breaks down complex patterns.

Games & Interactive.name: Multiplayer Trivia Game
Games & Interactive.desc: Real-time multiplayer quiz with room codes, live leaderboard, power-ups, custom question packs, and spectator mode. Smooth animations throughout.

Games & Interactive.name: 2D Platformer (Pixel Quest)
Games & Interactive.desc: Retro pixel-art platformer with physics engine, level editor, collectibles, enemies with AI pathfinding, and local high-score board.

Games & Interactive.name: Chess Engine with AI
Games & Interactive.desc: Fully playable chess with drag-and-drop, move validation, AI opponent (minimax + alpha-beta pruning), game history, and PGN export.

Games & Interactive.name: Interactive Data Story
Games & Interactive.desc: Scroll-driven narrative visualization combining data journalism with interactive charts. Readers explore data by scrolling through animated story chapters.

Games & Interactive.name: Typing Speed Racer
Games & Interactive.desc: Competitive typing game with WPM tracking, accuracy stats, multiplayer races, difficulty levels, and progression system with achievements.

Cloud & DevOps.name: CI/CD Pipeline Dashboard
Cloud & DevOps.desc: Unified view of all CI/CD pipelines across GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and Jenkins. Build status, deployment history, rollback controls, and Slack notifications.

Cloud & DevOps.name: Container Orchestration Monitor
Cloud & DevOps.desc: Real-time Kubernetes cluster dashboard with pod status, resource utilization, log streaming, and auto-scaling visualizations.

Cloud & DevOps.name: Serverless Function Deployer
Cloud & DevOps.desc: One-click serverless function deployment tool with code editor, environment variables manager, cold-start metrics, and execution logs.

Cloud & DevOps.name: Infrastructure Cost Calculator
Cloud & DevOps.desc: Estimate and compare cloud costs across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Save configurations, forecast spend, and get optimization recommendations.

Cloud & DevOps.name: Uptime Monitor & Status Page
Cloud & DevOps.desc: Monitor website/API health with ping checks, latency tracking, incident management, and a public status page. Email/SMS alerting on downtime.

Mobile & PWA.name: Habit Tracker PWA
Mobile & PWA.desc: Offline-first habit tracking app with streak counting, heatmap calendar, push notifications, weekly reports, and motivational quotes.

Mobile & PWA.name: Expense Splitter (SplitEase)
Mobile & PWA.desc: Group expense splitting with real-time balance calculation, payment integration, receipt scanning (OCR), and settlement suggestions.

Mobile & PWA.name: Workout & Fitness Logger
Mobile & PWA.desc: Exercise tracking with custom routines, progress charts, rest timers, PR tracking, and body measurement logs. Works offline.

Mobile & PWA.name: QR Code Generator & Scanner
Mobile & PWA.desc: Generate styled QR codes with logos, colors, and shapes. Scan QR codes via camera with history and batch generation support.

Mobile & PWA.name: Offline Notes App (Notecraft)
Mobile & PWA.desc: Rich-text note-taking with folders, tags, search, markdown support, and cloud sync when online. Dark mode and focus mode included.

IoT & Hardware.name: Smart Attendance System (RFID)
IoT & Hardware.desc: IoT attendance tracker using RFID tags with ESP32, real-time cloud sync, admin dashboard, attendance reports, and late-arrival alerts.

IoT & Hardware.name: Home Environment Monitor
IoT & Hardware.desc: Temperature, humidity, and air quality monitoring with historical charts, threshold alerts, and smart device integration via MQTT.

IoT & Hardware.name: Plant Watering Automation
IoT & Hardware.desc: Soil moisture monitoring with automated watering schedule, camera feed for plant health, and mobile notifications when plants need attention.

IoT & Hardware.name: Smart Door Lock System
IoT & Hardware.desc: NFC/PIN-based door lock with access logs, remote unlock via app, visitor management, and emergency override. Secure BLE communication.

Security & Auth.name: OAuth2 Authentication Service
Security & Auth.desc: Full OAuth2/OIDC provider with Google/GitHub social login, JWT tokens, refresh rotation, RBAC, and 2FA (TOTP). Production-grade security.

Security & Auth.name: Password Manager (Vault)
Security & Auth.desc: Encrypted password vault with AES-256, master password derivation (Argon2), browser extension, auto-fill, and secure sharing.

Security & Auth.name: Vulnerability Scanner
Security & Auth.desc: Automated security scanner for web apps - checks for XSS, SQLi, CSRF, misconfigurations, and generates detailed remediation reports.

Security & Auth.name: Rate Limiter & API Gateway
Security & Auth.desc: Configurable API gateway with rate limiting, IP whitelisting, request logging, abuse detection, and real-time traffic analytics.

Creative & Media.name: Collaborative Whiteboard
Creative & Media.desc: Real-time drawing canvas with layers, shapes, text, image upload, undo/redo, and multi-user collaboration via WebRTC.

Creative & Media.name: Meme Generator Studio
Creative & Media.desc: Drag-and-drop meme editor with template library, custom text styling, image filters, GIF export, and trending meme feed.

Creative & Media.name: Podcast Hosting Platform
Creative & Media.desc: Upload, host, and distribute podcasts with RSS feed generation, episode analytics, embedded player widget, and AI-generated transcripts.

Creative & Media.name: Color Palette Generator
Creative & Media.desc: AI-driven color palette generator from images or moods. Includes contrast checker, CSS/Tailwind export, palette saving, and accessibility scoring.

Creative & Media.name: Video Thumbnail Maker
Creative & Media.desc: Template-based thumbnail designer with text overlays, background remover, batch export, and integration with YouTube to auto-suggest styles.
